name: BlackBoxStocks
description_short: AI-powered options flow scanner and stock screener with real-time alerts, dark pool data, and an active trading community.
description_long:
BlackBoxStocks combines options flow scanning, stock screening, and community-driven trading into a single platform. The system uses proprietary algorithms to identify unusual options activity and high-probability setups across the entire US equities and options market.

The platform stands out for its real-time alert system that flags unusual volume spikes, large block trades, and dark pool activity. Traders can filter by sector, market cap, option type, premium size, and dozens of other criteria. The built-in stock screener runs alongside the options flow scanner, giving users a comprehensive view of market activity.

BlackBoxStocks also includes a live trading community with chat rooms, educational webinars, and real-time trade sharing. The Pro tier adds advanced analytics, historical flow data, and priority alert delivery. At $79.97/month (or $959.64/year), it sits in the mid-range of options flow tools — cheaper than FlowAlgo but more expensive than basic screeners.

tiers.name: Equities & Options Premium

pros: Combines options flow + stock screener in one platform
Active trading community with live chat
cons: No free tier or trial period
No broker integration for direct trading
scraped_features: Options Flow Scanner — tracks large aggressive buying activity in specific options contracts to follow institutional money in real-time
Dark Pool Scanner — real-time and historical data on private exchange trades with volume profile charting
Algo-based Alerts — scans 11,000+ stocks multiple times per second for volatile moves; pre-market, volume active, price spike, rapid decline, and options-specific alerts
Level 2 Volatility Indicator — measures buy/sell pressure based on bid/ask volume within 10-second windows
Proprietary Chart Studies — Dark Pool Volume Profile, Options Dollar Flow, Net Options Delta, Gamma Exposure, Opening Range Breakout, GoNoGo Trend Study
Live Trading Rooms — chat with team traders and community members; live channels with entries/exits guidance
Real-time News Feed — multi-source news (Business Wire, Reuters, Seeking Alpha, Zero Hedge, etc.) with options-specific filtering
Discord Community — dynamic, uncensored trading community for strategy sharing and peer support
Mobile App — real-time push notifications for alerts on iOS/Android
unique_selling_points: Proprietary Options Flow Scanner reveals institutional order flow — core differentiator vs. competitors
Dark Pool transparency — real-time visibility into block trades and institutional activity outside public markets
Integrated trading community on platform — no tab-switching between platform and Discord
Team Traders program — established traders (Steven Kang 18+ yrs banking, Maria Chaudhry former Schwab/Ameritrade stockbroker, HellsBells 20 yrs experience) provide live guidance and education
Institutional-grade charting with proprietary studies at retail price points
Algorithm-based alerts claim to catch moves before they occur in real-time
